2606.20094.title: MakeupMirror: Improving Facial Attribute Preservation in Diffusion Models for Makeup Transfer
2606.20094.paper_summary: Makeup transfer models enable fun augmented reality (AR) experiences as well as virtual try-on (VTO) for online makeup shopping. While recent state-of-the-art diffusion based solutions such as Stable-Makeup dramatically improve the accuracy and realism of makeup transfer, they still face limitations in identity and skin color preservation, making production-level VTO for makeup shopping unrealistic. In this work, we propose MakeupMirror, a diffusion-based approach to makeup transfer that makes significant progress towards preserving facial features and skin tone. We introduce several technical innovations over Stable-Makeup: (1) integration of facial geometry conditioning with ControlNets to maintain facial fidelity; (2) region-specific makeup transfer control to enable precise makeup application across facial regions such as skin, eyes and lips; (3) skin tone-based makeup transfer modulation that prevent skin tone alteration in cross-subject transfer scenarios; and (4) integration of a Levenberg-Marquardt Langevin sampler to speed up inference while maintaining generation quality. Our experiments on CPM-Real, Makeup Wild, and (herein newly collected, more diverse) MakeupSelfies datasets show that MakeupMirror improves relative facial recognition similarity by +60%, reduces relative skin tone difference by -50% over Stable-Makeup, with a latency of 0.7s, while achieving expert acceptance rate of 94% across core facial identity preservation criteria.
2606.20094.paper_summary_zh: 化妝轉移模型使得有趣的擴增實境 (AR) 體驗以及在線化妝購物的虛擬試妝 (VTO) 成為可能。雖然最近的最先進擴散基礎解決方案如 Stable-Makeup 顯著提高了化妝轉移的準確性和真實感，但在身份和膚色保留方面仍然面臨限制，使得化妝購物的生產級 VTO 顯得不切實際。在本研究中，我們提出了 MakeupMirror，一種基於擴散的化妝轉移方法，顯著推進了面部特徵和膚色的保留。我們在 Stable-Makeup 的基礎上引入了幾項技術創新：(1) 將面部幾何條件與 ControlNets 整合，以維持面部的真實性；(2) 區域特定的化妝轉移控制，以實現對皮膚、眼睛和嘴唇等面部區域的精確化妝應用；(3) 基於膚色的化妝轉移調制，以防止在跨主體轉移場景中膚色的改變；以及 (4) 整合 Levenberg-Marquardt Langevin 取樣器，以加快推理速度，同時保持生成質量。我們在 CPM-Real、Makeup Wild 和（此處新收集的，更具多樣性的）MakeupSelfies 數據集上的實驗顯示，MakeupMirror 相對於 Stable-Makeup 提高了 +60% 的面部識別相似度，減少了 -50% 的相對膚色差異，延遲為 0.7 秒，同時在核心面部身份保留標準上達到了 94% 的專家接受率。
2606.20094.author: Nefeli Andreou et.al.
2606.20094.authors: Nefeli Andreou, Angel Martínez-González, Sabine Sternig, Matthieu Guillaumin, Epameinondas Antonakos, Michael Opitz
